title: 这条 prompt 描述了一个高端化妆品广告场景，通过细致入微的视觉元素和文字描述，营造出一种奢华、优雅的感觉，适合用于高端护肤品或化妆品的中文营销场景。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 描述了一个高端化妆品广告场景，通过细致入微的视觉元素和文字描述，营造出一种奢华、优雅的感觉，适合用于高端护肤品或化妆品的中文营销场景。
prompt_original: A luxurious cosmetic product advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, light-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÉRE"} and {argument name="product type" default="MOISTURE RICH CREAM"} with "AGING CARE*" below it. The background consists of soft, draped, shimmering champagne-colored silk fabric with delicate white flowers on the left. The lighting is warm, ethereal, and sun-drenched with soft bokeh. At the top center, elegant dark brown Japanese typography reads {argument name="main headline" default="肌に、静かな贅沢を。"} above a small decorative gold divider and the text {argument name="subheadline" default="高保湿×エイジングケア*"}. To the right of the jar, a thin gold circle contains Japanese text meaning 'With dense moisture, high-quality firmness and radiance'. At the bottom center is a dark rectangular call-to-action button with a thin gold border containing the text {argument name="button text" default="詳しく見る"} and a right-pointing chevron. In the bottom right corner, tiny fine print contains Japanese text meaning '*Care according to age'.
prompt_zh: 一款奢华化妆品广告，展示一个优雅的玻璃罐子，配有闪亮的金色盖子，放在一块圆形浅色大理石板上。罐子上有金色文字写着{argument name="品牌名称" default="LUMIÉRE"}和{argument name="产品类型" default="滋润霜"}，下面有“抗老化*”。背景是柔和的、垂挂的、带有微妙光泽的香槟色丝绸布料，左侧点缀着精致的白色花朵。灯光温暖、空灵且充满阳光，带有柔和的散景效果。顶部中央，优雅的深棕色日文标题写着{argument name="主标题" default="给肌肤，宁静的奢华。"}，上面有一个小的装饰性金色分隔线，下面是文本{argument name="副标题" default="高保湿×抗老化*"}。罐子右侧，一个细金圆圈内包含日文，意为“密集保湿，高品质紧致与光彩”。底部中央是一个带有细金边的深色矩形行动号召按钮，上面写着{argument name="按钮文字" default="查看详情"}并带有一个向右指的箭头。在右下角，微小的精细印刷字体包含日文，意为'*根据年龄护理'。
